subcodes.first_line: Praise and glorification befitteth the Sovereign of hearts and souls, Who, despite the kindling of innumerable fires of hatred and enmity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد و ثنا مولف افئده و قلوب را لایق و سزا که مع اشتعال نار بغضا و عناد لاتحصی
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @suffering and imprisonment, @prayer for protection, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @prayer for unity
